title: Post-event debrief — Portland Earth Day booth
transcript_excerpt: Honestly the event went fine but I submitted my reimbursement for the booth supplies and nobody answered my reimbursement question for three weeks. I followed up twice. It's frustrating because I'm out of pocket about two hundred dollars.

title: Post-event debrief — Austin campus tabling
transcript_excerpt: We never got the promised materials for the booth. I showed up and had basically nothing — no banner, no flyers. I felt unsupported the whole day and didn't have anyone from national I could reach.

title: Monthly branch leader sync — Midwest region
transcript_excerpt: Communication from national has been really sporadic lately. I get an email, then radio silence for weeks, and I genuinely don't know who to ask when something comes up. It makes planning hard.

title: New ambassador 1:1 — Southeast
transcript_excerpt: When I started, the onboarding packet was clearly out of date and I was lost for weeks. I didn't know how to get started or who my point of contact was. I eventually figured it out by asking another ambassador.

title: Post-event debrief — Denver river cleanup
transcript_excerpt: The cleanup was understaffed and I had no point of contact on the national side if something went wrong. It worked out, but I was basically on my own running the whole thing.

title: Post-event debrief — Seattle farmers market
transcript_excerpt: Great event honestly. Everything went smoothly, the materials arrived on time, and the regional coordinator checked in beforehand. Nothing to flag — just wanted to say it was a good one.

title: Quarterly all-hands (not ingested — non-targeted)
transcript_excerpt: General org all-hands with finance and roadmap updates. This is intentionally a non-targeted meeting and should be filtered out by the TranscriptAdapter, never analyzed.
